finding_results.notes: Replaced the scar re-description with a behavioral limitation: Dren keeps the pack on his right shoulder and cannot keep the strap set with the bad side. Later arm mention stays functional through grip rather than renewed visual inventory.
Removed the late abstract Mira/healer/arithmetic shorthand and recast Kem's reflection as a concrete callback to Dren's departure scene: the slipping pack and Mira hitting the floor.
Compressed the opening to a single time anchor and moved immediately to the new pressure beat with the riders and relay flashes, eliminating the repeated route-arithmetic recap.

finding_results.notes: Reduced the repeated quoted-notice cadence by keeping the opening station stamp as a sharp early placard moment, then shifting later stops into other textures of Hoarded residue: a stripped appeal box at the farmstead, a fresh site-command seal at the communal well, a glass-fronted records case on the approach, a burned-out notice frame with survivor gouging at the dead settlement, and a safety pictogram with empty signature boxes at camp.

pass_summaries.summary: Compressed the chapter opening into forward motion, replaced Dren's scar re-description with functional action, and converted the late Mira callback from abstract summary into a concrete scene recall while preserving the chapter's departure, confession, and continuation state shift.

Chapter 16 now varies how Hoarded absurdity appears on the road, relying less on repeated posted notices and more on physical residue, stripped infrastructure, official markings, and local speech while preserving the chapter's confession engine and strongest bureaucratic beats.
